---
pagetitle: "Tool Registry - Architecture 2.0"
description: "A community-maintained registry of simulators, proxy models, verification harnesses, benchmarks, and data representations for auditable computer-architecture and computing-system design loops."
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    toc: false
listing:
  - id: tool-catalog
    contents: tools.yml
    template: _tool-card.ejs.md
    categories: true
    filter-ui: true
    sort-ui: false
    fields: [title, description, authors, institution, paper_url, status, example_loop, categories]
    field-required: [title, url, description, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="site-wrap">
<header class="site-masthead">
  <span class="pill">Architecture 2.0</span>
  <span class="pill hot">Living registry</span>
</header>

<section class="site-hero">
  <div class="hub-kicker">Tool registry</div>
  <h1>Tool registry</h1>
  <p class="subtitle">The action space for AI-assisted architecture</p>
</section>

<p class="site-lede">
The tools below make up the working environment an architecture design agent
operates in: the simulators and proxy models that supply feedback, the
verification harnesses and benchmarks that supply evidence, and the data
representations that let a loop read and write a design. Filter by category to
find what a given loop needs.
</p>

<p class="site-lede">
The registry is community-maintained. If you have built an open-source simulator,
surrogate model, verification harness, or agentic workflow, you can
<a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/architecture20/issues/new?template=submit_tool.yml">propose
it for the registry</a>. Submissions can include authors, institutions, papers,
and artifact status so the card gives credit as well as a useful link.
</p>

<nav class="site-actions" aria-label="Tool registry actions">
  <a class="site-action" href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/architecture20/issues/new?template=submit_tool.yml">Submit a tool <span class="arr">&rarr;</span></a>
  <a class="site-action secondary" href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/architecture20/discussions">Discuss fit</a>
  <a class="site-action tertiary" href="/workshops.html">See workshops</a>
</nav>

<div class="category-strip" aria-label="Tool registry categories">
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('')">All</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('U2ltdWxhdGlvbg==')">Simulation</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('UHJveHklMjBNb2RlbHM=')">Proxy models</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('QWdlbnRpYyUyMFdvcmtmbG93cw==')">Agentic workflows</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('RGF0YSUyMFJlcHJlc2VudGF0aW9ucw==')">Data representations</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('VmVyaWZpY2F0aW9u')">Verification</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('QmVuY2htYXJrcw==')">Benchmarks</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('UGh5c2ljYWwlMjBEZXNpZ24=')">Physical design</button>
</div>
</div>
```

:::{#tool-catalog}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
window.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  var listing = window.quartoListings?.["listing-tool-catalog"] ||
    window["quarto-listings"]?.["listing-tool-catalog"];
  var input = document.querySelector("#listing-tool-catalog .search");
  if (!listing || !input) {
    return;
  }
  input.addEventListener("input", function () {
    listing.search(input.value);
  });
});
</script>
```
